subject: Urgent: Database Down
body: Our production database has been down for 3 hours. We need immediate escalation to the infrastructure team. This is critical.

subject: Payment Processing Issue
body: The payment processing service failed this morning. We still waiting for a response from your team. Multiple customers complaining.

subject: Follow up: Unresolved Issue
body: Hi team - following up on the issue I reported last week. It's still not resolved and is impacting our operations.

subject: Late Delivery Status
body: Our shipment was supposed to arrive 5 days ago. We have no response from your support team. This is unacceptable.

subject: Minor Bug Report
body: Noticed a typo on the login page. Not urgent but wanted to let you know.

subject: Complaint: Poor Customer Service
body: Your customer service is terrible. I've been on hold for 2 hours and no one has helped me. Very frustrated with your company.

subject: Re: Account Access Problem
body: I'm writing again about the account access issue. Still unable to log in. This is blocking all my work.

subject: Production Error Alert
body: Error code 5XX appearing frequently in production. System is experiencing crashes. Please escalate to executive team immediately.

subject: General Inquiry
body: Hi there - just wanted to know about your pricing plans for the enterprise tier.

subject: Service Degradation
body: Your API has been slow all day. Response times are 10x normal. This is affecting our platform performance.
